prompt_text: A tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, seen from behind in a medium close-up at the left side of a bed, gently tucking the quilt around a sleeping woman; a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, lies on the right side with only half of her closed face visible, completely unresponsive. prompt_text: A kneeling maidservant in ancient China occupies the lower center of the frame outside a closed door, head slightly lowered in a posture of submission, simple period servant clothing in muted tones, hands gathered respectfully, delivering a message she cannot personally cross the threshold with. Old timber, stone floor, sparse empty corridor, ritual hierarchy and intrusion held together in one static image.
